title: Matthew Karnitschnig steps down as Euractiv’s editor-in-chief
summary_full: Matthew Karnitschnig is stepping down as editor-in-chief of Euractiv, he told staff on Tuesday.  “It has been a great privilege to work with the Euractiv team and help rebuild the newsroom,” Karnitschnig said. “I’m proud of what we have achieved together, especially the record traffic and Pro-subscriber growth. With the organisation entering a new phase, […]
